pages.text: Tier-2 of the Soul Sand Valley: a $(bold)full-size$() island of $(item)soul sand$() and soul soil, riddled with $(item)bone$() fossils and lit by ghostly $(item)soul fire$(). A pack of $(item)Skeletons$() haunts it, with Endermen and the odd Ghast overhead.

$(bold)Yields$()$(br)Soul sand by the ton — for $(item)Wither$() skulls' stand, soul-speed roads, and Nether wart farms — plus soul soil, and bone blocks from the fossils for endless bone meal. Skeletons drop the bones and arrows.

$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Desert Skyseed$() with $(item)soul sand$() and a $(item)bone block$() fossil. (Soul sand comes from the Nether; a bone block you can dig from an overworld $(bold)fossil$(), or craft from bones.) $(br)$(br)Thrown topside it makes a tiny patch of $(bold)desert$() instead.
